hindi: जय श्याम बाबा खाटू वाले। हारे हुओं के भाग्य उजाले॥
english: Victory to Shyam Baba of Khatu; brightening the fortunes of those who have lost hope
roman: Jai Shyam Baba Khatu Wale, Haare Huon Ke Bhagya Ujale

hindi: बर्बरीक थे भीम पुत्र वीर। कृष्ण को शीश दिया धीर॥
english: Heroic Barbarika, son of Bhima; steadfastly offered his head to Krishna
roman: Barbarik The Bheem Putra Veer, Krishna Ko Shish Diya Dhir

hindi: हारे हुओं के श्याम सहाई। भक्त जनों की पीड़ा मिटाई॥
english: Shyam is the helper of those who have lost hope; he removes the pain of devotees
roman: Haare Huon Ke Shyam Sahai, Bhakt Janon Ki Peeda Mitai

hindi: फाल्गुन शुक्ल द्वादशी मेला। खाटू में लाखों का खेला॥
english: The fair on Falgun Shukla Dwadashi; lakhs celebrate at Khatu
roman: Phalgun Shukla Dwadashi Mela, Khatu Mein Laakhon Ka Khela

hindi: श्याम बाबा का दरबार न्यारा। भक्त जन करते जयकारा॥
english: The court of Shyam Baba is unique; devotees cheer in victory
roman: Shyam Baba Ka Darbar Nyara, Bhakt Jan Karte Jaykara

hindi: श्याम चालीसा जो पढ़े। जीवन में शुभ फल वो बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Shyam Chalisa; auspicious fruits grow in life
roman: Shyam Chalisa Jo Padhe, Jeevan Mein Shubh Phal Vo Badhe

hindi: जय जय श्याम खाटू वाले। भक्तन के दुख तत्काल टाले॥
english: Victory to Shyam of Khatu; immediately removing the sorrows of devotees
roman: Jai Jai Shyam Khatu Wale, Bhaktan Ke Dukh Tatkaal Tale
